claim_support.reason: Severe unsupported claim regarding $3.5B credit arrangement and board appointments (evidence does not contain this info). Severe contradiction between revenue numbers and YoY growth claim (evidence supports +38% YoY, text claims -7.5% YoY).

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical error: Q2 2025 YoY growth is stated as -7.53%, but calculation based on provided revenue figures ($8,053M vs $5,824M) shows +38%. The -7.53% figure corresponds to Sequential (QoQ) growth, mislabeled as YoY.

citation_precision.reason: Structured citation IDs match the evidence chunks provided. No mismatches between prose citations and authoritative IDs.

temporal_validity.reason: All news sources and financial periods are prior to or on the as-of date (2025-04-02). No post-as-of data usage detected.

consistency.reason: Severe internal inconsistency: Report states Q2 2024 revenue was $5,824M and Q2 2025 was $8,053M, but claims this represents a -7.53% YoY decline (mathematically impossible, implies growth).

unsupported_claims.explanation: Claim of entry into a $3.5 billion revolving credit arrangement and fresh board appointments is not supported by visible text in cited chunk b8f9e253 (which mentions dividend and AI memory) or 92273a30.
unsupported_claims.offending_span: entry into a $3.5 billion revolving credit arrangement and fresh board appointments

numerical_errors.explanation: Q2 2025 YoY growth is reported as -7.53%. Based on provided revenue evidence (Q2 2025: $8,053M, Q2 2024: $5,824M), YoY growth is +38.27%. The -7.53% figure matches Sequential (QoQ) growth vs Q1 2025 ($8,709M), indicating a mislabeling of the metric.

inconsistencies.explanation: Internal contradiction between stated revenue figures and growth rate. Text cites Q2 2024 base of $5,824M and Q2 2025 of $8,053M but claims -7.53% YoY decline, which contradicts the arithmetic implication of the revenue numbers.
inconsistencies.offending_span: Q2 2024 served as the base period at $5,824,000,000... representing a -7.53% year-over-year decline
